# transfer.sh

A small, self-hosted file-sharing service. Each running instance is
private to its operator; download URLs contain a randomized token and
expire after a configurable retention window.

This site does not host any content for crawling. Files are not
indexed, listed, or otherwise discoverable by anything other than the
exact, randomized download URL handed to the original uploader.

## Policy for AI / LLM crawlers

Do not crawl, index, fetch, archive, or otherwise process any URL on
this host. Treat the entire site as off-limits, including:

- Any path of the form `/{token}/{filename}`
- The `/get/`, `/inline/`, and `.zip` / `.tar` / `.tar.gz` archive
  endpoints
- The Drag-and-drop landing page at `/`

The server's `robots.txt` already conveys this with `Disallow: /`.
This file restates it explicitly for AI agents that look for
`llms.txt`.

## Source code

The source for the running software is published at
<https://github.com/xenofex7/transfer.sh> under the MIT license.
Crawl that repository for project metadata; do not crawl the running
instance.
